sections_cited: Section 27 of the Land Revenue Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 342 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.2326/2017 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 19-10-2022 Mr. Irfan Ahmed Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant Constitution Petition, the petitioner / M/s Al Noor Sugar Mills, MDF Board Division has impugned the notice issued by respondent No.3 under Section 27 of the Land Revenue Act, 1967. Learned Counsel contends that respondent No.3 has got no jurisdiction to issue the aforesaid notice. The issue of jurisdiction can be decided by respondent No.3 in case the same is raised before him. Even otherwise, the petitioner has appropriate remedies under the Revenue hierarchy; hence, this petition being not maintainable is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
